description: Cert-Manager monitoring dashboard for tracking certificate issuance, renewal, errors and resource usage
title: Cert-Manager Monitoring

widgets.description: Total number of certificates successfully issued by cert-manager
widgets.title: Total Certificates Issued

widgets.title: Cert-Manager Uptime

widgets.title: Certificates Issued by Issuer

widgets.description: Rate of certificate issuance over time
widgets.title: Certificate Issuance Rate

widgets.description: Number of certificates approaching expiration and pending renewal
widgets.title: Certificates Pending Renewal

widgets.description: Number of errors during certificate issuance
widgets.title: Certificate Issuance Errors

widgets.description: Number of errors during certificate renewal
widgets.title: Renewal Errors

widgets.description: Errors related to communication with Kubernetes API server
widgets.title: API Server Errors
